panels.title: Weekly stage progression by source
panels.hogql: SELECT toStartOfWeek(timestamp) AS week_start, coalesce(properties['paid_source'], lower(properties['utm_source']), 'unknown') AS paid_source, event, uniq(distinct_id) AS users FROM events WHERE event IN ('auth_sign_up_page_viewed','auth_sign_up_completed','onboarding_viewed','onboarding_assessment_complete','dashboard_welcome_viewed') AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 12 WEEK GROUP BY week_start, paid_source, event ORDER BY week_start ASC, paid_source ASC, event ASC

panels.title: Signup conversion by source (page view to complete)
panels.hogql: WITH viewed AS (SELECT coalesce(properties['paid_source'], lower(properties['utm_source']), 'unknown') AS paid_source, uniq(distinct_id) AS users_viewed FROM events WHERE event = 'auth_sign_up_page_viewed' AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY GROUP BY paid_source), completed AS (SELECT coalesce(properties['paid_source'], lower(properties['utm_source']), 'unknown') AS paid_source, uniq(distinct_id) AS users_completed FROM events WHERE event IN ('auth_sign_up_completed','clerk_sign_up_completed') AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY GROUP BY paid_source) SELECT coalesce(viewed.paid_source, completed.paid_source) AS paid_source, coalesce(viewed.users_viewed, 0) AS users_viewed, coalesce(completed.users_completed, 0) AS users_completed, if(coalesce(viewed.users_viewed, 0) = 0, 0, round(100.0 * coalesce(completed.users_completed, 0) / viewed.users_viewed, 2)) AS signup_cvr_percent FROM viewed FULL OUTER JOIN completed ON viewed.paid_source = completed.paid_source ORDER BY signup_cvr_percent DESC

panels.title: Onboarding completion by source
panels.hogql: WITH viewed AS (SELECT coalesce(properties['paid_source'], lower(properties['utm_source']), 'unknown') AS paid_source, uniq(distinct_id) AS users_viewed FROM events WHERE event IN ('onboarding_viewed','onboarding_step_viewed') AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY GROUP BY paid_source), completed AS (SELECT coalesce(properties['paid_source'], lower(properties['utm_source']), 'unknown') AS paid_source, uniq(distinct_id) AS users_completed FROM events WHERE event = 'onboarding_assessment_complete' AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY GROUP BY paid_source) SELECT coalesce(viewed.paid_source, completed.paid_source) AS paid_source, coalesce(viewed.users_viewed, 0) AS users_viewed, coalesce(completed.users_completed, 0) AS users_completed, if(coalesce(viewed.users_viewed, 0) = 0, 0, round(100.0 * coalesce(completed.users_completed, 0) / viewed.users_viewed, 2)) AS onboarding_cvr_percent FROM viewed FULL OUTER JOIN completed ON viewed.paid_source = completed.paid_source ORDER BY onboarding_cvr_percent DESC

panels.title: Step diagnostics by source
panels.hogql: SELECT coalesce(properties['paid_source'], lower(properties['utm_source']), 'unknown') AS paid_source, coalesce(properties['step_name'], properties['step'], properties['funnel_step'], 'n/a') AS funnel_step, event, count() AS events, uniq(distinct_id) AS users FROM events WHERE event IN ('onboarding_step_viewed','onboarding_step_completed','onboarding_step_back_clicked','onboarding_step_validation_failed','onboarding_assessment_funnel_step') AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY GROUP BY paid_source, funnel_step, event ORDER BY paid_source ASC, funnel_step ASC, users DESC

panels.title: Async onboarding failures
panels.hogql: SELECT event, coalesce(properties['reason'], 'unknown') AS reason, count() AS failures, uniq(distinct_id) AS users FROM events WHERE event IN ('onboarding_linkedin_oauth_failed','onboarding_resume_upload_failed','onboarding_analysis_failed') AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY GROUP BY event, reason ORDER BY failures DESC

panels.title: Assessment CTA to dashboard welcome rate
panels.hogql: WITH cta AS (SELECT coalesce(properties['paid_source'], lower(properties['utm_source']), 'unknown') AS paid_source, uniq(distinct_id) AS users_cta FROM events WHERE event IN ('assessment_summary_cta_clicked','onboarding_continue_to_dashboard') AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY GROUP BY paid_source), welcomed AS (SELECT coalesce(properties['paid_source'], lower(properties['utm_source']), 'unknown') AS paid_source, uniq(distinct_id) AS users_welcomed FROM events WHERE event = 'dashboard_welcome_viewed' AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY GROUP BY paid_source) SELECT coalesce(cta.paid_source, welcomed.paid_source) AS paid_source, coalesce(cta.users_cta, 0) AS users_cta, coalesce(welcomed.users_welcomed, 0) AS users_welcomed, if(coalesce(cta.users_cta, 0) = 0, 0, round(100.0 * coalesce(welcomed.users_welcomed, 0) / cta.users_cta, 2)) AS activation_percent FROM cta FULL OUTER JOIN welcomed ON cta.paid_source = welcomed.paid_source ORDER BY activation_percent DESC
